title: genista interrupta var. juniperina
intro: Genista interrupta var. juniperina, also known as Spiny broom or Juniper Broom, is a flowering shrub in the legume family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Genista interrupta var. juniperina include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and act as an antispasmodic to reduce muscle cramps and spasms. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a variety of ailments.
